title: Wolf Armor
description: Add Wolf armor and weapons with Fabric
body:
![Mod loader: Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/modloader-Fabric-1976d2?style=flat-square&logo=data:image/png;base64,)
![Environment: Client & Server](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-Client%20&%20Server-1976d2?style=flat-square)

Add Wolf armor and weapons

![Wolf armor demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VnUR2XyU/images/114d5b48994ba847a7ea8488da6945bb0d2bc04c.png)

Wolf Leather and Wolf tooth can be dropped on Wolf

## Craft

- Wolf armor (like any vanilla armor but with wolf leather)
![Wolf helmet craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d750689816bd06cb70dc3af95a9cc7605849e703.png)

- Wolf sword
![Wolf sword craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8dd478f1bc987cac2f8c5dbb500edd5067e1d33.png)

- Wolf dagger
![Wolf dagger craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86eeb069b59e156e50421350dd2ad114612a1788_0.webp)

- Wolf bow
![Wolf bow craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e196176851d93618e8727276e3821bd10b30bf9.png)

- Book: You can use wolf leather to craft book
- Item frame: You can use Wolf leather instead of leather
- Arrow: You can craft arrow with wolf tooth instead of flint
- Bone meal: You can craft bone meal with 1 wolf tooth

## Compatibility

Mods tested with Wolf armor

- [Helmet Overlay](https://github.com/minecraft-fr-net/helmet-overlay-mod)
- [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
